use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers and user dropdowns
Show avatars in comment sections and social feeds
Render user identity in dashboard user lists and team member grids
Display profile pictures in modal dialogs and card components
Provide accessible avatar fallback with initials when images fail to load
ai_summary: A reusable avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with image loading support, fallback text display, and consistent rounded-full styling for displaying user profile pictures across web applications. Features automatic aspect ratio maintenance and muted background fallback for missing images.
